cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So there are five people on a soccer team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Their starting positions are given. Let me list them out first. Start: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps that happen during the game. The problem is asking where Bob ends up at the end. Let me go through each swap step by step and track everyone's positions. First swap: Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Bob is right midfielder and Dave is cheerleader. After swapping, Bob becomes cheerleader and Dave becomes right midfielder. Let me note that. After first swap: - Alice: right winger (unchanged) - Bob: cheerleader - Claire: left winger (unchanged) - Dave: right midfielder - Eve: goalkeeper (unchanged) Second swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave is right midfielder, Eve is goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes right midfielder. After second swap: -
